name: reposcout
description: Expose RepoScout as a read-only repository context MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Find relevant repo files before broad search.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Dockerized RepoScout MCP server that mounts the current checkout read-only and exposes find_context for bounded GLOB, GREP, and READ exploration with compact file-line citations.
defaultPrompt: Use RepoScout to find the files for this bug.
Ask RepoScout for relevant context before searching.
Find where this behavior is implemented.
